name: lunlunglass
description: LunlunGlass — 眼镜店打印系统（Studio 模板设计 + POS 门店运营）

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others -c "cyan.bold,green.bold,yellow.bold,magenta.bold,blue.bold,red.bold" -n studio-fe,studio-be,studio-el,pos-fe,pos-be,pos-el "pnpm --filter lunlunglass-studio-frontend dev" "pnpm --filter lunlunglass-studio-backend dev" "pnpm --filter lunlunglass-studio-electron dev" "pnpm --filter lunlunglass-pos-frontend dev" "pnpm --filter lunlunglass-pos-backend dev" "pnpm --filter lunlunglass-pos-electron dev"
